subject: Arcanine — a large canine Pokemon with orange fur and dark striping, depicted mid-stride with flames trailing from its legs
description: A large dog-like creature with orange and cream-white fur marked with dark tiger-like stripes dominates the frame. It is depicted in a dynamic mid-stride or leaping pose, flames trailing from its legs and paws. Its mane is full and pale. The pose communicates speed and power. The background is warm-toned with flame effects reinforcing the fire energy. The art style is clean anime-adjacent illustration typical of the Pokemon TCG.
foreground: large canine creature with orange and dark-striped fur, leaping with fire trailing from legs
background: warm flame-tinted background, abstract fire elements
emotion: powerful, forward-driving; mid-action with no hesitation in the stride
